description.ko: 잊힌 기계실이 FLORA-9의 프랙탈 꽃과 부드러운 디지털 꽃잎으로 뒤덮이며 고요한 봄 정원으로 변한다.
description.en: A forgotten machine room becomes a quiet spring garden as FLORA-9 covers obsolete technology with fractal flowers and soft digital petals.

prompt: FLORA-9 as a peaceful reclaimed server conservatory at early spring dawn: rows of obsolete server racks stand open like trellises while living emerald vines thread through cable trays, keyboards, and cooling grates. From each vent blooms a different fractal flower, its digital petals unfolding in recursive spirals of blush pink and sky blue, with delicate lace-like circuitry softened by dew. Deep plum shadows gather beneath the old machines, while pale pastel light washes across glass panels cracked by roots. High-density luminous seed-motes drift slowly through the air, not as harsh pixels but as soft botanical code spores, suggesting a garden that keeps regenerating itself from forgotten technology. Wide interior composition, serene atmosphere, fine botanical detail, gentle volumetric haze, organic textures overtaking hard metal surfaces, digital nature, eternal spring.
